data.title: OrthoPediatrics Corp. debuts 3P™ Pediatric Plating Platform™ Hip System in the US with first surgical case. Nasdaq: KIDS.
data.description: OrthoPediatrics Corp., a leading player in pediatric orthopedics (Nasdaq: KIDS), has unveiled the 3P™ Pediatric Plating Platform™ Hip System in the United States. This innovative system is designed to address proximal femur fractures and deformities in children. The company recently conducted the first surgical case using this new platform, marking a significant advancement in pediatric orthopedic care.

data.title: KB Home opens new community, Entrada Del Toro at Rancho Sahuarita in Tucson, Arizona. Site features homes tailored for modern living.
data.description: KB Home, a leading U.S. homebuilder listed on NYSE as KBH, unveiled the grand opening of Entrada Del Toro in Sahuarita, Arizona. This new community is located within the renowned Rancho Sahuarita master plan. Positioned in Sahuarita, known for its convenient access to outdoor activities, family events, and picturesque desert and mountain views, Entrada Del Toro offers homes tailored to modern living. With its prime location, this development is set to attract residents seeking a vibrant lifestyle in a beautiful setting.

data.title: KB Home unveils 2 new communities in East Las Vegas within gated Manzano neighborhood, near Vegas Strip.
data.description: In Las Vegas, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled two new communities, Glades and Vales at Manzano, within the gated Manzano neighborhood. The homes are located in East Las Vegas near the famous Las Vegas Strip and bustling shopping, dining, and entertainment spots. These residences are tailored to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchens that open into spacious great rooms and generous bedroom suites. KB Home is recognized as one of the leading and most reputable homebuilders in the United States.

data.title: Five Point Infrastructure sells Northwind Midstream to MPLX LP for $2.375 billion in cash, providing sour gas services in New Mexico.
data.description: Five Point Infrastructure LLC has confirmed the sale of Northwind Delaware Holdings LLC to MPLX LP for a cash consideration totaling $2.375 billion. Established in 2022 by Five Point, Northwind offers services related to sour gas gathering, treating, and processing in Lea County, New Mexico. This acquisition addresses a significant industry challenge and underscores the value of Northwind's operations in the region.

data.title: NextDecade (NASDAQ: NEXT) updates on Q2 2025 & early Q3 2025 progress, completing Train 4 commercialization at Rio Grande LNG.
data.description: NextDecade Corporation, a publicly traded company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol NEXT, has released updates on its progress during the second quarter of 2025 and the early third quarter of 2025. The CEO highlighted the advancements in constructing Phase 1 of Rio Grande LNG and expanding its capacity. Specifically, the completion of Train 4 commercialization and the ongoing work on the engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) were emphasized as significant milestones. These developments showcase the company's commitment to growth and safety in the liquefied natural gas sector.

data.title: Jericho Project wins NYC Council award, gets $340,000 for veterans' housing and services.
data.description: New York City Council members Robert Holden, Pierina Sanchez, and Inna Vernikov have backed the allocation of funding to support housing and services for veterans from all age groups and periods of service. On August 1, 2025, the Jericho Project, a nonprofit dedicated to resolving homelessness in New York for over four decades, received a significant grant of $340,000.

data.title: Demetra acquires OrthoFundamentals, a provider of SI joint fusion solutions, and launches a global spine division.
data.description: Milan, August 1, 2025 - Demetra, a leading international medical company specializing in bone cements, spacers, and biomaterials for orthopedic use and PJI infection management, has revealed their complete purchase of OrthoFundamentals, LLC. This acquisition signifies a significant development in the company's expansion and market presence.

data.title: Belgravia Hartford doubles Bitcoin Treasury to 83 BTC by acquiring 42 BTC, marking largest purchase to date.
data.description: Belgravia Hartford Capital Inc. announced acquiring an additional 42.3776327 Bitcoin (BTC) on July 31, 2025, in what is their largest single-day purchase of the cryptocurrency to date. This surpasses their previous milestone of buying 25 BTC on July 24, 2025. The latest transaction effectively doubled Belgravia's Bitcoin holdings. The company has made significant moves in increasing its digital asset portfolio.

U.S. TARIFFS WILL BE A BIG HIT TO GLOBAL TRADE New U.S. tariffs will likely hurt global trade and reduce international competition, says Berenberg economist Atakan Bakiskan. Canada and Switzerland face especially high rates of 35% and 39%. The tariffs take effect August 7.
